email_template.subject: Your BodyMind OS license is ready!
email_template.body:
Thanks for purchasing BodyMind OS!

Your license key is: {license_key}

Open the app at https://ericjoye.github.io/bodymind-os/app/ and paste your key to activate Pro or Studio features.

Need help? Reply to this email or contact support@ericjoye.com.

— The BodyMind OS Team
